Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features another installment of "The Family", and Tim Conway's "World's Oldest Man".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Durward Kirby get into the ring for the boxing movie spoof, "Goldman's Boy."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guests Chita Rivera and Vince Edwards help spoof "distinguished women's movies" in "To Each Her Own Tears."
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Vince Edwards

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi joins Carol, Burt Reynolds shows up for Q&A, and John Davidson salutes classic movies from MGM.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Image.alt: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Jim Nabors is like Caine in "Kung Fu" in a spoof of the David Carradine TV series, here entitled "Yung Fool."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: This "Family Show" features Dick as an airport traveller getting a long, awkward farewell from his family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol's guests tonight are Garry Moore and Durward Kirby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Art Carney & Pat Carroll guest. Art plays an exterminator, then he & Pat appear on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Art Carney

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Jack Klugman sings with Carol, while Tony takes part in a sketch as part of a tribute to Broadway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife obsessed with celebrity gossip. Then, a take-off on a classic with "Rebecky."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Guest Steve Lawrence appears in a WWII spoof, and Carol sings "You Light Up My Life" while bathing Tim.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway & The Pointer Sisters star! Sketches include "Up Your Income", and Tim as Nora Desmond's butler.
Video.title: Tim Conway, The Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tim Conway appears in a sketch where a couple paints their home. In "Carol & Sis", Carol waits up for Chris.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: The season finale features the regular cast, highlighting Carol's performance as the girlfriend of a producer.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner guest. Gorshin does impressions, then joins Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars. Tim's engagement ring for Carol causes bad luck. Also featured: "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Alan King stars as a psychiatrist. Also: Carol tries making breakfast; a nurse & patient recognize each other.
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Tim Conway guest star, highlighted by a sketch in which Lucy and Carol are Rent-A-Car agents.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins to lunch. Also: Harvey & Carol pick up on each other in a bar.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jane Connell and Tim Conway star! Harvey & Tim are tipsy friends coming home. Also: The Arabian Nights spoof.
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
